lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮ ਨਿਧਾਨ ਤਿਸਹਿ ਪਰਾਪਤਿ ਜਿਸੁ ਸਬਦੁ ਗੁਰੂ ਮਨਿ ਵੂਠਾ ਜੀਉ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naam nidhaan tiseh paraapat jis sabad guroo man vootthaa jeeo |2|
lines.english: The Treasure of the Naam is obtained by one whose mind is filled with the Word of the Guru's Shabad. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਜੋ ਪੀਵੈ ਸੋ ਤ੍ਰਿਪਤਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: jo jo peevai so tripataavai |
lines.english: Whoever drinks this in, is satisfied.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਮਰੁ ਹੋਵੈ ਜੋ ਨਾਮ ਰਸੁ ਪਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: amar hovai jo naam ras paavai |
lines.english: Whoever obtains the Sublime Essence of the Naam becomes immortal.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਿ ਹਰਿ ਰਸੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਸੋ ਤ੍ਰਿਪਤਿ ਅਘਾਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: jin har ras paaeaa so tripat aghaanaa |
lines.english: One who obtains the Sublime Essence of the Lord is satisfied and fulfilled.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਿ ਹਰਿ ਸਾਦੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਸੋ ਨਾਹਿ ਡੁਲਾਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: jin har saad paaeaa so naeh ddulaanaa |
lines.english: One who obtains this Flavor of the Lord does not waver.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸਹਿ ਪਰਾਪਤਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮਾ ਜਿਸੁ ਮਸਤਕਿ ਭਾਗੀਠਾ ਜੀਉ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: tiseh paraapat har har naamaa jis masatak bhaageetthaa jeeo |3|
lines.english: One who has this destiny written on his forehead obtains the Name of the Lord, Har, Har. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸੁ ਲਗਿ ਮੁਕਤੁ ਭਏ ਘਣੇਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: tis lag mukat bhe ghanere |
lines.english: Attached to Him, a great many have been liberated.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੁ ਨਿਧਾਨਾ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਪਾਈਐ ਕਹੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਵਿਰਲੀ ਡੀਠਾ ਜੀਉ ॥੪॥੧੫॥੨੨॥
lines.translit: naam nidhaanaa guramukh paaeeai kahu naanak viralee ddeetthaa jeeo |4|15|22|
lines.english: The Gurmukh obtains the Treasure of the Naam; says Nanak, those who see the Lord are very rare. ||4||15||22||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਇਕਸੁ ਹਥਿ ਆਇਆ ਵਰਸਾਣੇ ਬਹੁਤੇਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: har ikas hath aaeaa varasaane bahutere |
lines.english: The Lord has come into the hands of the One, the Guru, who has blessed so many with good fortune.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਝ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: maajh mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Maajh, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਧਿ ਸਿਧਿ ਰਿਧਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਮੇਰੈ ॥
lines.translit: nidh sidh ridh har har har merai |
lines.english: My Lord, Har, Har, Har, is the nine treasures, the supernatural spiritual powers of the Siddhas, wealth and prosperity.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨਮੁ ਪਦਾਰਥੁ ਗਹਿਰ ਗੰਭੀਰੈ ॥
lines.translit: janam padaarath gahir ganbheerai |
lines.english: He is the Deep and Profound Treasure of Life.

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਾਖ ਕੋਟ ਖੁਸੀਆ ਰੰਗ ਰਾਵੈ ਜੋ ਗੁਰ ਲਾਗਾ ਪਾਈ ਜੀਉ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: laakh kott khuseea rang raavai jo gur laagaa paaee jeeo |1|
lines.english: Hundreds of thousands, even millions of pleasures and delights are enjoyed by one who falls at the Guru's Feet. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਗਲ ਉਧਾਰੇ ਭਾਈ ਮੀਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: sagal udhaare bhaaee meetaa |
lines.english: and all family and friends are saved.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਗਮ ਅਗੋਚਰੁ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਅਪੁਨਾ ਗੁਰ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਤੇ ਸਚੁ ਧਿਆਈ ਜੀਉ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: agam agochar suaamee apunaa gur kirapaa te sach dhiaaee jeeo |2|
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, I meditate on the Inaccessible and Unfathomable True Lord. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਰਸਨੁ ਪੇਖਤ ਭਏ ਪੁਨੀਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: darasan pekhat bhe puneetaa |
lines.english: Gazing upon the Blessed Vision of His Darshan, all are sanctified,

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਡਭਾਗੀ ਦਰਸਨੁ ਕੋ ਵਿਰਲਾ ਪਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: vaddabhaagee darasan ko viralaa paae |
lines.english: By great good fortune, receive His Darshan.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕਉ ਖੋਜਹਿ ਸਰਬ ਉਪਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: jaa kau khojeh sarab upaae |
lines.english: The One, the Guru, who is sought by all-only a few,

lines.gurmukhi: ਊਚ ਅਪਾਰ ਅਗੋਚਰ ਥਾਨਾ ਓਹੁ ਮਹਲੁ ਗੁਰੂ ਦੇਖਾਈ ਜੀਉ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: aooch apaar agochar thaanaa ohu mehal guroo dekhaaee jeeo |3|
lines.english: His Place is lofty, infinite and unfathomable; the Guru has shown me that palace. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਹਿਰ ਗੰਭੀਰ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਨਾਮੁ ਤੇਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: gahir ganbheer amrit naam teraa |
lines.english: Your Ambrosial Name is deep and profound.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੁਕਤਿ ਭਇਆ ਜਿਸੁ ਰਿਦੈ ਵਸੇਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: mukat bheaa jis ridai vaseraa |
lines.english: That person is liberated, in whose heart You dwell.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਿ ਬੰਧਨ ਤਿਨ ਕੇ ਸਗਲੇ ਕਾਟੇ ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਸਹਜਿ ਸਮਾਈ ਜੀਉ ॥੪॥੧੬॥੨੩॥
lines.translit: gur bandhan tin ke sagale kaatte jan naanak sehaj samaaee jeeo |4|16|23|
lines.english: The Guru cuts away all his bonds; O Servant Nanak, he is absorbed in the poise of intuitive peace. ||4||16||23||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਤੇ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਧਿਆਵਉ ॥
lines.translit: prabh kirapaa te har har dhiaavau |
lines.english: By God's Grace, I meditate on the Lord, Har, Har.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭੂ ਦਇਆ ਤੇ ਮੰਗਲੁ ਗਾਵਉ ॥
lines.translit: prabhoo deaa te mangal gaavau |
lines.english: By God's Kindness, I sing the songs of joy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਝ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: maajh mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Maajh, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੁ ਅਉਖਧੁ ਮੋ ਕਉ ਸਾਧੂ ਦੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: naam aaukhadh mo kau saadhoo deea |
lines.english: The Holy Saint has given me the Medicine of the Naam.

lines.gurmukhi: ਊਠਤ ਬੈਠਤ ਸੋਵਤ ਜਾਗਤ ਹਰਿ ਧਿਆਈਐ ਸਗਲ ਅਵਰਦਾ ਜੀਉ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: aootthat baitthat sovat jaagat har dhiaaeeai sagal avaradaa jeeo |1|
lines.english: While standing and sitting, while sleeping and while awake, meditate on the Lord, all your life. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਲਬਿਖ ਕਾਟੇ ਨਿਰਮਲੁ ਥੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: kilabikh kaatte niramal theea |
lines.english: My sins have been cut out, and I have become pure.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਦੁ ਭਇਆ ਨਿਕਸੀ ਸਭ ਪੀਰਾ ਸਗਲ ਬਿਨਾਸੇ ਦਰਦਾ ਜੀਉ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: anad bheaa nikasee sabh peeraa sagal binaase daradaa jeeo |2|
lines.english: I am filled with bliss, and all my pains have been taken away. All my suffering has been dispelled. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿ ਕਰੇ ਜਿਨਿ ਗੁਰੂ ਪਛਾਤਾ ਸੋ ਕਾਹੇ ਕਉ ਡਰਦਾ ਜੀਉ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: sat kare jin guroo pachhaataa so kaahe kau ddaradaa jeeo |3|
lines.english: One who recognizes the Guru practices Truth; why should he be afraid? ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਕਾ ਅੰਗੁ ਕਰੇ ਮੇਰਾ ਪਿਆਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: jis kaa ang kare meraa piaaraa |
lines.english: One who has my Beloved on his side,

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਮੁਕਤਾ ਸਾਗਰ ਸੰਸਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: so mukataa saagar sansaaraa |
lines.english: Is liberated from the world-ocean.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਸਿ ਸਾਸਿ ਹਰਿ ਗਾਵੈ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਢਾਕਿ ਲੀਆ ਮੇਰਾ ਪੜਦਾ ਜੀਉ ॥੪॥੧੭॥੨੪॥
lines.translit: saas saas har gaavai naanak satigur dtaak leea meraa parradaa jeeo |4|17|24|
lines.english: With each and every breath, Nanak sings the Lord's Praises. The True Guru has covered my sins. ||4||17||24||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਭੇਟਤ ਹਉ ਗਈ ਬਲਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: gur bhettat hau gee balaae |
lines.english: The demon of pride has departed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਬ ਤੇ ਸਾਧੂ ਸੰਗਤਿ ਪਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: jab te saadhoo sangat paae |
lines.english: Since I found the Company of the Holy and met the Guru,

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਤਿ ਪੋਤਿ ਸੇਵਕ ਸੰਗਿ ਰਾਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: ot pot sevak sang raataa |
lines.english: Through and through, the Lord is intermingled with His servant.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਝ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: maajh mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Maajh, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭ ਪ੍ਰਤਿਪਾਲੇ ਸੇਵਕ ਸੁਖਦਾਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: prabh pratipaale sevak sukhadaataa |
lines.english: God, the Giver of Peace, cherishes His servant.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਾਣੀ ਪਖਾ ਪੀਸਉ ਸੇਵਕ ਕੈ ਠਾਕੁਰ ਹੀ ਕਾ ਆਹਰੁ ਜੀਉ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: paanee pakhaa peesau sevak kai tthaakur hee kaa aahar jeeo |1|
lines.english: I carry the water, wave the fan, and grind the grain for the servant of my Lord and Master. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਟਿ ਸਿਲਕ ਪ੍ਰਭਿ ਸੇਵਾ ਲਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: kaatt silak prabh sevaa laaeaa |
lines.english: God has cut the noose from around my neck; He has placed me in His Service.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋਈ ਕਮਾਵੈ ਜੋ ਸਾਹਿਬ ਭਾਵੈ ਸੇਵਕੁ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਬਾਹਰਿ ਮਾਹਰੁ ਜੀਉ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: soee kamaavai jo saahib bhaavai sevak antar baahar maahar jeeo |2|
lines.english: He does that which pleases his Lord and Master. Inwardly and outwardly, the servant knows his Lord. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੁਕਮੁ ਸਾਹਿਬ ਕਾ ਸੇਵਕ ਮਨਿ ਭਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: hukam saahib kaa sevak man bhaaeaa |
lines.english: The Lord and Master's Command is pleasing to the mind of His servant.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂੰ ਦਾਨਾ ਠਾਕੁਰੁ ਸਭ ਬਿਧਿ ਜਾਨਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: toon daanaa tthaakur sabh bidh jaaneh |
lines.english: You are the All-knowing Lord and Master; You know all ways and means.
